text:
Created attachment 194897
[PATCH] FDP Primer: Chapter 12. PO Translations: 'TRANSLATOR' is already set for 'textproc/docproj'

en_US.ISO8859-1/books/fdp-primer/po-translations/chapter.xml;

this chapter pointed that the 'TRANSLATOR' option should be set for textproc/docproj, but I see it is already enabled by default. patch available.
